steps.title: Identify the sentence structure
steps.content: The blank sits between two independent clauses connected by the conjunctive adverb however: Compiling isn't exclusive to certain programming languages and any language can incorporate this tool.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: Choice D uses the punctuation pattern keyed as correct for joining these clauses with however. The other three options each fail: A and C produce structures that the official key rejects for this item, and B creates a comma splice with only commas surrounding however. That matches choice D — D is correct.
